prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 11953→13815→12613→16048→19190，整体呈明显后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 6600 名；2025 年基准约 19190 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 87→85→86→93→92 人，基本稳定在 85–93 人区间；2026 年计划大幅增至 140 人，较 2025 年扩招约 52%，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2025 年约第 42–47 名，2026 年升至第 45 名，近年排名稳中有升；抖音热度为"较热"（总排名第 54），短视频曝光量中等偏上；声誉评价未见明显负面事件，投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，报考心理平稳；兽医学 A+、畜牧学 A+、作物学 A、水产 A、食品科学与工程 A，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机 类、机械类、食品科学与工程类等）匹配，有助于维持报考热度；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 20.8 万人，较 2025 年微增约 0.6%，竞争强度基本持平；华中农业大学位于湖北武汉，距贵州较近，属中部地区，对贵州考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在贵州 招生占比约 1.5%–3.9%（2021–2025 年），属中等偏低水平，扩招后占比将明显提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 52% 以及考生总数基本持平，在 2025 年基准 19190 名基础上预计位次显著后移；但软科排名微升、工科专业热度较高可部分对冲扩招效应。预测最低位次约 24997 名，区间 24497–25497 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年物理类大幅扩招约 52%，位次预计明显后移，预测区间 24497–25497 名。位次在区间下限（24497 名）附近可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（动物医学、计算机类）；位次在区间中段（约 25000 名）以二档为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上限（25497 名）附近以三档保底、二档为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11953→13815→12613→16048→19190, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6600 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 19190; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 87→85→86→93→92 respectively, basically stable in the 85–93 range; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 140, an expansion of about 52% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2025, approximately 42nd–47th, rising to 45th in 2026, with rankings steadily improving in recent years; Douyin popularity is "relatively hot" (overall ranking 54th), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no obvious negative events in reputation evaluation, no signs of admission gaps in abnormal filing records, stable application psychology; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Mechanical, Food Science and Engineering, etc.), helping maintain application heat; in 2026, the province's Physics Category examinees are about 208,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025, with competition intensity basically flat; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, relatively close to Guizhou, belonging to the central region, with some regional appeal to Guizhou examinees; the university's enrollment share in Guizhou is about 1.5%–3.9% (2021–2025), at a medium-to-low level, and will significantly increase after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 52% in 2026, and the basically flat total number of examinees, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 19190; however, the slight rise in Soft Science ranking and high popularity of engineering majors may partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24997, with a range of 24497–25497.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Veterinary Medicine
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Biological Sciences (National Base Class in Biological Sciences, National Base Class in Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law
- Food Science and Engineering
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Aquaculture (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program in Aquaculture, Aquarium Science and Technology)
- Landscape Architecture (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program)
- Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering
- Sociology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category expands significantly by about 52%, with rankings expected to shift noticeably backward, predicted range 24497–25497. Candidates near the lower bound (24497) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Veterinary Medicine, Computer Science); those in the middle range (about 25000) should prioritize Tier 2 with Tier 1 as supplement; those near the upper bound (25497) should use Tier 3 as safety and Tier 2 as main.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2156→2184→3345→3613→3438. It remained basically stable from 2021 to 2022, but shifted significantly backward by about 1200 places starting in 2023, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1250 places over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3438th place. The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 16→16→16→17→18 students, increasing slightly year by year. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 11 students, a decrease of about 39% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2025, it ranked approximately 42nd to 47th, rising to 45th in 2026, with stable or slightly improving rankings in recent years. Its Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 54th), with medium to high short video exposure. There are no obvious negative incidents in reputation evaluation, and no signals of enrollment gaps in abnormal filing records, indicating stable application psychology. Veterinary Medicine is A+, Animal Husbandry is A+, Crop Science is A, Aquaculture is A, Food Science and Engineering is A, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics. The History Category enrollment majors (Landscape Architecture, Business Administration, Sociology, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors are mainly management, language, and sociology categories, with polarized social popularity (Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see). In 2026, the province has about 91,000 History Category examinees, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025, with basically stable competition intensity. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, relatively close to Guizhou, offering some regional appeal to Guizhou examinees. The university's enrollment share in Guizhou is about 1.5%–3.9%, and after the reduction in History Category plans, this share will decrease.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction of about 39% in the 2026 plan, and the basically stable total number of examinees, the ranking is expected to move forward (intensified competition) based on the 2025 baseline of 3438th place. However, the low correlation between History Category enrollment majors and the university's advantageous disciplines, along with the polarized social popularity of majors, may partially alleviate the competition pressure caused by enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2686th place, with a range of 2203–3169th place.

- Business Administration (Marketing, Human Resource Management, Accounting, Financial Management, Business Administration).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category enrollment is significantly reduced by about 39%, with rankings expected to move forward, predicted range 2203–3169th place. Candidates near the lower limit of the range (2203rd place) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Landscape Architecture, Business Administration); those near the middle of the range (about 2700th place) should mainly target Tier 2 majors; those near the upper limit (3169th place) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
